zh.lifeSummary: Dame, Anna Elphinstone是Harry Elphinstone和Elizabeth Henderson的女兒，於1627年1月1日出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾可萊。她於1617年與Sir Robert Lockhart, Baron of Lee Castle在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1707年8月11日在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Dame, Anna Elphinstone是Harry Elphinstone和Elizabeth Henderson的女儿，于1627年1月1日出生在英国苏格兰藍納可爾可萊。她于1617年与Sir Robert Lockhart, Baron of Lee Castle在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1707年8月11日在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elphinstone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Scottish: locative name from Elphinstone in Tranent (Midlothian).

nameMeanings.name: Dame,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Informal short form of   David  , sometimes bestowed as an independent given name.

variants.name: David
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: Dame, Anna Elphinstone was born on 1 January 1627, in Cleghorn, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the daughter of Harry Elphinstone and Elizabeth Henderson. She married Sir Robert Lockhart, Baron of Lee Castle in 1617, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 11 August 1707, in Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Dame, Anna Elphinstone est née le 1 janvier 1627, à Cleghorn, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fille de Harry Elphinstone et Elizabeth Henderson. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Lockhart, Baron of Lee Castle en 1617, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 11 août 1707, à Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Dame, Anna Elphinstone wurde am 1. Januar 1627 in Cleghorn, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Harry Elphinstone und Elizabeth Henderson geboren. Sie hat 1617 in Schottland, United Kingdom Sir Robert Lockhart, Baron of Lee Castle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 11. August 1707 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Dame, Anna Elphinstone è nata il il 1 gennaio 1627 nel Cleghorn, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito come figlia di Harry Elphinstone e Elizabeth Henderson. Lei sposato Sir Robert Lockhart, Baron of Lee Castle nel 1617, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 11 agosto 1707, nel Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dame, Anna Elphinstoneは1627年1月1日にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアクレグホールンでHarry ElphinstoneとElizabeth Hendersonの娘として生まれた。1617年にイギリススコットランドでSir Robert Lockhart, Baron of Lee Castleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1707年8月11日にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dame, Anna Elphinstone(은)는 1627년 1월 1일 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 클레고른에서 Harry Elphinstone(와)과 Elizabeth Henderson의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1617년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Sir Robert Lockhart, Baron of Lee Castle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1707년 8월 11일 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1 JAN 1627–11 AUG 1707: 1 de janeiro de 1627–11 de agosto de 1707
pt.lifeSummary: Dame, Anna Elphinstone nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1627, em Cleghorn, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom filha de Harry Elphinstone e Elizabeth Henderson. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Lockhart, Baron of Lee Castle em 1617, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 11 de agosto de 1707, em Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Dame, Anna Elphinstone родилась 1 января 1627 г. в местности клегаурн, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Harry Elphinstone и Elizabeth Henderson. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Lockhart, Baron of Lee Castle в 1617 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 11 августа 1707 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет.

es.1 JAN 1627–11 AUG 1707: 1 de enero de 1627–11 de agosto de 1707
es.lifeSummary: Dame, Anna Elphinstone nació el 1 de enero de 1627, en Cleghorn, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido como hija de Harry Elphinstone y Elizabeth Henderson. Se casó con Sir Robert Lockhart, Baron of Lee Castle en 1617, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 11 de agosto de 1707, en Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años.
